name: Dave & Buster's Entertainment, Inc.
business: Dave & Buster's Entertainment, Inc. owns and operates 243 venues in North America under the Dave & Buster's and Main Event brands, offering entertainment and dining experiences including arcade games, sports viewing, and food and beverage. The company's entertainment revenues accounted for approximately 62.9% of total revenues during fiscal 2025. As of February 3, 2026, the company had 179 Dave & Buster's branded stores and 64 Main Event stores.

exposures.sentence: Cybersecurity breaches or other privacy or data security incidents that expose confidential customer, personal employee or other material, confidential information that is stored in our information systems or by third parties may adversely impact our business.
Entertainment Game play is a key aspect of the entertainment experience at each of our stores, which we believe is the core differentiating feature of our brands.
Our success depends upon our ability to recruit and retain qualified store management and operating personnel while also controlling our labor costs.
